Capability Domain Basis: Neither an onboard product nor a domain-specific Columbia construction service is identified for this UEI.
Primary Output Basis: Public data do not identify a defensible Columbia-specific article or service for this UEI.

Capability Domain Basis: Switchgear and switchboards distribute and protect ship-service electrical power.
Primary Output Basis: Switchgear and switchboards are acceptance-testable electrical distribution equipment.

Capability Domain Basis: Welded strategic-missile launch tubes are launcher hardware, which D6 explicitly covers.
Primary Output Basis: Welded strategic-missile launch tubes are completed structural components installed into CMC quad packs.

Capability Domain Basis: Nuclear-qualified instrumentation, control electronics, processors, and power-supply modules are component-level electronic hardware.
Primary Output Basis: Instrumentation/control electronics and power supplies are functional control units, not proven integrated shipsets.

Capability Domain Basis: Large complex-welded and machined support and structural assemblies are best classified as structural fabrication.
Primary Output Basis: Machined/welded machinery or support assemblies are fit-ready fabricated articles without a defined standalone function.

Capability Domain Basis: PRL supplies cast pump and valve bodies and components; foundry casting is the differentiating competence rather than a complete D4 system.
Primary Output Basis: Machined cast pump/valve bodies and components are fit-ready parts for larger fluid equipment.

Capability Domain Basis: Super-heavy open-die forging of shafts, rings, or other critical shapes is the differentiating process, regardless of end use.
Primary Output Basis: Large shaft/ring forgings are upstream metal inputs needing downstream machining and assembly.

Capability Domain Basis: Digital-twin and lifecycle software support many ship areas but do not establish one technical or material domain.
Primary Output Basis: Digital-twin software and construction/lifecycle work-instruction tools are technical work products.

Capability Domain Basis: Ship-service ball valves, high-pressure valves, and actuators are fluid and pressure-system equipment.
Primary Output Basis: Ship-service and high-pressure valves are bounded functional fluid-control units.

Capability Domain Basis: Alloy elbows, tees, reducers, flanges, and tube fittings route and join pressure-boundary fluid lines.
Primary Output Basis: Elbows, tees, reducers, flanges, and tube fittings are fit-ready piping components.

Capability Domain Basis: Missile-tube assemblies are launcher hardware for the Common Missile Compartment, an explicit D6 function.
Primary Output Basis: Missile-tube assemblies are completed launch-tube structures for installation into the CMC, not an outfitted module.

Capability Domain Basis: The undisclosed integrated part could be mechanical, structural, electrical, or control hardware, so no single domain is defensible.
Primary Output Basis: Precision-fabricated mechanical subassemblies/support skids are fit-ready shipboard parts, not proven systems.

Capability Domain Basis: Hamill’s differentiating contribution is precision machining of valve parts, so process competence controls over the valve’s D4 end use.

Capability Domain Basis: Condensers, air ejectors, and heat exchangers transfer heat in the submarine steam plant.
